title: Show real work, not AI clones
meta_description: Build a portfolio that beats AI clones — show constraints, resilience code, and failure metrics. In 2026, shipping under real conditions beats feature lists every time.
prewritten_tweet:
Most engineers waste months building AI clones.

The ones who get hired prove they can ship under constraints — 3G latency, flaky payments, real failures.

https://kubaik.github.io/show-real-work-not-ai-clones

#Blockchain #AI #MobileDev #GetHired

Done this differently? Tell me what worked.
